perspectives.excerpt: The American fast-food chain Taco Bell is removing lettuce from its menu at many locations following reports of explosive diarrhoea linked to a multistate outbreak. The outbreak is the largest US outbreak of cyclosporiasis, a parasitic infection spread through contaminated food or water. While no deaths have been reported, 94 people have been hospitalised.

perspectives.excerpt: England holds on to defeat France 6-4 in wild World Cup third place match Bukayo Saka scored three goals to lead England to a 6-4 win over France for third place in the World Cup, while Kylian Mbappé surpassed Argentina's Lionel Messi's career World Cup scoring record and took the lead in the Golden Boot race with a pair of second-half goals on Saturday.…

perspectives.headline: France's Mbappe sets World Cup scoring record with 22 goals
perspectives.excerpt: France's Mbappe sets World Cup scoring record with 22 goals July 19, 2026France's Kylian Mbappe became the top scorer in World Cup history on Saturday after netting a 22nd goal in the third-place play-off against England. However, his team suffered a 6-4 defeat to the Three Lions in Didier Deschamps' last match as France's head coach.…

stories.headline_en: The Tate brothers are arrested in Miami, U.S. Marshals Service tells AP

perspectives.headline: The Tate brothers are arrested in Miami, U.S. Marshals Service tells AP
perspectives.excerpt: The brothers were taken into custody on a sealed warrant, the Marshals Service told the AP. British prosecutors said they were seeking the extradition of the brothers on rape and trafficking charges.

perspectives.headline: Radical misogynist influencer Andrew Tate and brother arrested in Miami
perspectives.excerpt: Radical misogynist influencer Andrew Tate and brother arrested in Miami US marshals Saturday arrested Andrew Tate and his brother Tristan in Miami on undisclosed charges. British authorities have been pushing for the extradition of the Tate brothers who face 59 charges in the UK including rape, sex trafficking, assault, tax evasion and money laundering.…

stories.headline_en: Russia launches deadly strikes on Kyiv after attack on Moscow warehouses

perspectives.headline: Russia launches deadly strikes on Kyiv after attack on Moscow warehouses
perspectives.excerpt: Russia launched strikes at Kyiv on Sunday that killed one person and wounded several one day after a deadly Ukrainian drone attack hit e-commerce warehouses near Moscow.

perspectives.headline: Ukraine drones target Russian warehouses and oil sites
perspectives.excerpt: Ukraine drones target Russian warehouses and oil sites July 18, 2026Ukrainian drone attacks have killed nine people and wounded over 80 more across Russia, say officials in Moscow, with Kyiv's strikes targeting logistics centers and sparking a fire at an oil depot.…

stories.headline_en: Силы ПВО сбили пять летевших на Москву беспилотников

perspectives.headline: Силы ПВО сбили пять летевших на Москву беспилотников
perspectives.excerpt: На месте падения обломков работают специалисты

perspectives.headline: Российские средства ПВО уничтожили пять летевших на Москву беспилотников
perspectives.excerpt: Российские средства ПВО Минобороны уничтожили пять беспилотников, летевших на Москву. Об этом сообщает мэр Москвы Сергей Собянин. «На месте падения обломков работают специалисты экстренных служб», — добавил Собянин. Ранее российские средства противовоздушной обороны за минувшие сутки уничтожили 13 управляемых авиационных бомб и 774 беспилотных летательных аппарата ВСУ.

stories.headline_en: Альпинист погиб при восхождении на Эльбрус

perspectives.headline: Альпинист погиб при восхождении на Эльбрус
perspectives.excerpt: Еще один человек пострадал

perspectives.headline: Один альпинист погиб, один пострадал при восхождении на Эльбрус
perspectives.excerpt: Один альпинист погиб, один пострадал при восхождении на Эльбрус Москва. 19 июля. INTERFAX.RU - Альпинист погиб во время восхождения на Эльбрус, сообщает пресс-служба Следственного управления СКР по КБР. По предварительным данным, 19 июля два человека совершали восхождение на Эльбрус. На высоте 4200 метров восточной вершины горы они сорвались со скал.…
